Home / Forms & Surveys / LimeSurvey

LimeSurvey — open source alternative

Long-established open source survey platform.

Strengths

  • Deep question types and logic.
  • Used widely in research and academia.
  • Self-hosted or paid cloud.

Weaknesses

  • UI feels dated.
  • Setup wizard is clunky.
  • Theming requires effort to match modern brands.
License: GPL-2.0 Self-host difficulty: 3/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

LimeSurvey is used as an alternative to

Typeform

Conversational forms and surveys.

See all alternatives →

Google Forms

Free forms attached to Google Sheets.

See all alternatives →
